TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Tjisaulem, title = Tjisaulem, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tjisaulem} }

S.FORM: alang Tjisaulem ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Rayiyong go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 59 buwan, 166 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 95% kyan ku 157 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 5% kyan ku 9 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 84%, Bunun 1%, Amis 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 9%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Tjisaulem hya' ga Puljekuwan. tay 'llaw na Tjisaulem hya' ga Tjakuvukuvulj. tay 'zil na Tjisaulem hya' ga Lemiyau. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Tjisaulem ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Rayiyong go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 59 buwan, 166 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 95% kyan ku 157 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 5% kyan ku 9 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 84%, Bunun 1%, Amis 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 9%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Tjisaulem hya' ga Puljekuwan. tay 'llaw na Tjisaulem hya' ga Tjakuvukuvulj. tay 'zil na Tjisaulem hya' ga Lemiyau. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ tjis~ɕaulem ɣa nija mki s~ɕku ħeto keŋ atu rajijoŋ ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pajwan **%, βunun *%, amis~ɕ *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na tjis~ɕaulem ħjaʔ ɣa puljekuwan. taj ʔllaw na tjis~ɕaulem ħjaʔ ɣa tjaku*uku*ulj. taj ʔzil na tjis~ɕaulem ħjaʔ ɣa lemijau. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
